title: AN ACT DECLARING CALLAO CAVE AND ITS PREMISES LOCATED AT CALLAO, MUNICIPALITY OF PE횄짱횂쩔횂쩍ABLANCA, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, A TOURIST ZONE

chunks.text:
H. NO. 2471 / 88 OG No. 21, 3089 (May 25, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7357, April 08, 1992 ]

AN ACT DECLARING CALLAO CAVE AND ITS PREMISES LOCATED AT CALLAO, MUNICIPALITY OF PE횄짱횂쩔횂쩍ABLANCA, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, A TOURIST ZONE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Callao Cave and its premises located at Callao, Municipality of Pe횄짱횂쩔횂쩍ablanca, Province of Cagayan, is hereby declared a tourist zone. As such, it shall be accorded priority development by the Department of Tourism and shall be subject to the rules and regulations governing the development of tourist zones.

SEC. 2. The Department of Tourism, in coordination with the Department of Environment and Natural Resources and other government agencies concerned, shall, within one (1) year from the approval of this Act, prepare a tourism development plan for Callao Cave and its premises, which shall provide for the construction, improvement and/or maintenance of such appropriate facilities and infrastructure as shall encourage tourism in the area.

SEC. 3. The Department of Tourism, through the Philippine Tourism Authority, shall take immediate steps to implement said development plan and shall incorporate the same in the department's overall tourism development programs for the ensuing calendar year.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 3, 1992 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: April 8, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
